corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — Lakeview City
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of Lakeview City data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — Lakeview City
Date: 2023-12-05

This record confirms Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in seven years. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.

corpus.title: News: Lakeview City — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in se...
corpus.content:
Lakeview City ANNOUNCES KEY MUNICIPAL UPDATE

Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in seven years. The announcement comes as changes in the municipal sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for municipal stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Lakeview City Council — Tax Rate Ordinance 2023-41
corpus.snippet: Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in seven years....
corpus.content:
LAKEVIEW CITY — PROPERTY TAX RATE ORDINANCE 2023-41
Adopted: December 5, 2023 | Effective: January 1, 2024

The City Council hereby sets the FY2024 general property tax levy rate at 6.92 mills per $1,000 assessed value, representing a reduction of 0.8% from the prior year rate of 6.975 mills.

This is the first reduction in the municipal tax rate since FY2017. The reduction reflects a $2.1M surplus carried forward from FY2023.
Adopted unanimously (8-0).
